name: Insurance Policy Details
description: Returns the policy record for a commercial insurance policy: line of business, premium, coverage limit, deductible, status, and effective date. Accepts policy_id as the primary key.

skills.name: get_policy_details
skills.description: Retrieve policy details — line of business, premium, coverage limit, deductible, status, and effective date — for a commercial insurance policy.
examples: show me the policy details for the Continental Freight policy
what is the coverage limit for this policy
what is the premium for POL-77001
what line of business is this policy
